releaseNotes:
Streaming transcript reliability update.

Fixes:
- Normal and agent responses wait for live text drain before reloading saved messages, so replies type out instead of appearing all at once
- Model thinking is saved as collapsible chat content, stays in the transcript, and is stripped before provider calls
- DeepSeek long-context selection keeps valid deepseek-v4-pro[1m] and deepseek-v4-flash[1m] model names
